name: Fortinet FortiSandbox
description: Fortinet FortiSandbox provides advanced threat detection through dynamic malware analysis, file sandboxing, and URL scanning with integration into the Fortinet Security Fabric

actions.name: Login
actions.description: Authenticate with FortiSandbox and obtain a session ID for subsequent API calls

actions.name: Submit File
actions.description: Upload a file to FortiSandbox for on-demand malware analysis and sandboxing

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: Base64-encoded file content to submit for analysis (max 200MB)

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: Name of the file being submitted

parameters.name: overwrite_vm_list
parameters.description: Comma-separated VM IDs to use for analysis (overrides default VM selection)

parameters.name: archive_passwords
parameters.description: Newline-separated passwords to try on encrypted archives

parameters.name: skip_steps
parameters.description: Comma-separated scan steps to skip (e.g., av_scan, cloud_query, sandbox)

actions.name: Submit URLs
actions.description: Submit one or more URLs for FortiSandbox analysis and URL rating

parameters.name: urls
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of URLs to submit for analysis

actions.name: Get Submission Job ID
actions.description: Retrieve the job ID(s) associated with a file submission using the submission ID

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Submission ID returned from the file upload

actions.name: Get Scan Result
actions.description: Query the scan result and verdict for a completed job, including risk rating and detected malware details

parameters.name: jid
parameters.description: Job ID to query for results

actions.name: Get File Verdict by Hash
actions.description: Look up the scan verdict for a previously analyzed file by its SHA256 or SHA1 hash

parameters.name: checksum
parameters.description: SHA256 or SHA1 hash of the file to look up

actions.name: Get URL Rating
actions.description: Query the FortiSandbox URL rating for a given URL

actions.name: Get PDF Report
actions.description: Download the detailed PDF analysis report for a completed job

parameters.name: jid
parameters.description: Job ID to get the PDF report for

parameters.name: sha256
parameters.description: SHA256 hash of the file to get the report for (alternative to jid)

actions.name: Cancel Submission
actions.description: Cancel a pending or in-progress file analysis submission

actions.name: Get Scan Statistics
actions.description: Retrieve overall scanning statistics and system health from the FortiSandbox appliance
